steps.t: You were given plates of food to leave on the counters in the Furukzahar feasting-hall before you can eat your own meal.
You were given plates of food to leave on the counters in the Furukzahar feasting-hall before you can eat your own meal.
You have satisfied the Temámir custom of serving a meal before eating your own, and can now enjoy it yourself.
Gírma has some advice for you.
Zadók can be found in the Kitchens of Furukzahar if you enjoyed the meal, and if you did not you were told to voice your displeasure to Alem outside t…
